params.TriggerDescription: Whenever equipped creature deals combat damage to an opponent, CARDNAME deals 2 damage to any target and you draw a card. Then, it deals damage to defending player equal to the number of cards in their hand and you gain 1 life for each card in your hand.

params.Description: Equipped creature gets +4/+4 and has protection from white, blue, and red.
params.AddKeyword: Protection from white & Protection from blue & Protection from red
